CONTENT.Club career: Shamkin made his debut in the Russian Football National League for Zenit-2 Saint Petersburg on 3 March 2019 in a game against Shinnik Yaroslavl, as a starter.He made his debut in the Russian Premier League for Zenit Saint Petersburg on 14 March 2020 in a game against Ural Yekaterinburg.On 21 July 2021, Shamkin joined Baltika Kaliningrad on a season-long loan. On 2 July 2022, Shamkin was loaned to KAMAZ Naberezhnye Chelny.On 10 July 2023, Shamkin joined Torpedo Moscow on a three-year contract.
CONTENT.External links: Daniil Shamkin at SoccerwayDaniil Shamkin at Russian Premier LeagueProfile by Russian Football National LeagueDaniil Shamkin at FootballFacts.ru (in Russian)
CONTENT.International career: He represented Russia at the 2019 UEFA European Under-17 Championship.

SUMMARY: Daniil Dmitriyevich Shamkin (Russian: Даниил Дмитриевич Шамкин; born 22 June 2002) is a Russian football player who plays as an forward for Torpedo Moscow.
